title: noccaea umbellata
intro: Noccaea umbellata, also known as the white wintercress or wintercress, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Noccaea umbellata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
